arts.ttl: 18 months after leaving Leicester, player finds himself as option for Bayern Munich – Transfer rules ruing massive opportunity
arts.sum: Daniel Amartey has found himself being linked with a move to Bayern Munich, just 18 months after leaving Leicester City on a free transfer. Merkur cover the situation today and how Bayern could have potentially looked at the free agent market to help cover for an injury crisis at the club. arts.ttl: A year on from Nottingham Forest exit, player finds himself linked with Bayern Munich – Transfer rules will stop surprise move
arts.sum: When Serge Aurier left Nottingham Forest last year for Galatasaray, it’s unlikely he thought he’d find himself being linked with Bayern Munich 12 months later. Yet, here we are. Merkur cover the situation today and how an injury crisis at the German giants has led the former Nottingham Forest man to being considered as an The post A year on from Nottingham Forest exit, player finds himself linked with Bayern Munich – Transfer rules will stop surprise move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 3rd, 2025: Who should play left-back for Bayern Munich vs. FC Augsburg?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is short on left-backs…and the situation actually got worse on Wednesday. If the former Borussia Dortmund star cannot play on Friday, then the Bavarians will truly be left scrambling and will have to use someone playing out of position.

arts.ttl: Leipzig chief comments on speculation linking Mario Gomez with Bayern
arts.sum: Oliver Mintzlaff has commented on speculation that Red Bull technical director Mario Gomez has attracted interest from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives injury update ahead of Bayern's trip to Augsburg
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has given an injury update ahead of his side's trip to Augsburg on Friday.

arts.ttl: Report: Situation with Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl is “dire”, summer exit “no longer ruled out”
arts.sum: Eberl’s contract runs until 2027, but the supervisory board has been considering how to restructure the sporting leadership for some time. Eberl went from being lauded for his work on the recent contract extensions to not even being in the room when Joshua Kimmich and Jamal Musiala finalized their deals?

arts.ttl: Special Skechers SKX Harry Kane Boots Released
arts.sum: Skechers continues to honor Harry Kane as the top scorer in his debut Bundesliga season with a special SKX_01 signature shoe dedicated to him.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany traveled to San Siro to scout Inter Milan and a defender, too
arts.sum: Kompany was not only watching Bayern's next Champions League opponent Inter, but also scouting Milan defender Malick Thiaw [ @marcoconterio, @86_longo ] https://t.co/D6w9KFE14u In the midst of preparing for both FC Augsburg in the Bundesliga and Inter Milan in the Champions League, Kompany traveled to San Siro to scout Inter Milan per Radio Sportiva journalist Marco Conterio (via @iMiaSanMia ):

arts.ttl: Report: Leroy Sané’s future unclear at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sané re-ups with Bayern Munich, the club has trouble selling Coman and Serge Gnabry, and all three players are back for next season. What will the wing position look like at Bayern Munich next season?

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: FC Barcelona boss Hansi Flick to make play for Bayern Munich’s Kingsley Coman; Bayern rejected by Tottenham Hotspur prospect?; Atlético Madrid eyeing RB Leipzig’s Benjamin Šeško, Sporting CP’s Viktor Gyökeres; and MORE!
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick is reportedly pushing the club’s sporting directors to pursue a move for Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman. Look, if Flick and FC Barcelona want to give Bayern Munich anything north of €25 million on Coman...then you just tell the Bavarians where to sign.
